items.content_html: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.
items.title: remotely-save/remotely-save: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.

items.content_html: This repository is a package with functions faciltating the display of plots, figures, tables, dataframes and such with the Execute Code plugin of Obsidian.

items.content_html: Quartz plugin to support pseudocode rendering at build-time with pseudocode.js. Works transparently with the Obsidian plugin obsidian-pseudocode.

items.content_html: Obsidian.md plugin which allows you to use your notes to embed, create, and update gists for Github and Opengist. Light & dark theme support, create / update public & private gists either manually or with autosave.
